summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Level and Advancement selector features. Verified dropdown options, disabled states, profile generation with specific hour ranges, badge display, toast notifications, and competency coverage logic. Core functionality working well with minor styling and edge case issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Advancement selector styling doesn't fully update when switching from disabled (Aléatoire) to enabled state (specific level selected)
Badge visibility inconsistent across different level+advancement combinations

integration_issues.issue: Generated 6h instead of expected 3-5h range for C1 + Début combination

passed_tests: Level selector dropdown displays all required options: Aléatoire, C1, C2, C3, C4
Advancement selector displays all required options: Aléatoire, Début, Milieu, Fin de compétence
Advancement selector is properly disabled (opacity-50, disabled=true) when level is Aléatoire
C4 + Fin generates student with 34h (within 31-40h range) and 100% progression
C1 + Fin generates student with 9h (within 9-11h range), all C1 covered (9/9), C2/C3/C4 not covered
Toast notification correctly shows competency levels (C1, C4) in profile generation messages
Badge display works correctly for C4 + Fin and C1 + Fin combinations
Profile generation respects selected level and advancement options
Competency coverage logic correctly implements level-based coverage (C1 students don't have C2/C3/C4)
Hour-to-competency mapping works as expected for tested combinations
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix advancement selector styling when transitioning from disabled to enabled state. Verify C1 + Début hour generation range (currently generates 6h instead of 3-5h). Improve badge visibility consistency across all level+advancement combinations.
